<<
  /Type /Pages
  /Count 1
  /Kids [14 0 R]
>>
endobj

2 0 obj
<<
  /Type /Font
  /Subtype /Type0
  /BaseFont /QXGCAR+DejaVuSerif-Bold
  /Encoding /Identity-H
  /DescendantFonts [3 0 R]
  /ToUnicode 6 0 R
>>
endobj

3 0 obj
<<
  /Type /Font
  /Subtype /CIDFontType2
  /BaseFont /QXGCAR+DejaVuSerif-Bold
  /CIDSystemInfo <<
    /Registry (Adobe)
    /Ordering (Identity)
    /Supplement 0
  >>
  /FontDescriptor 5 0 R
  /DW 0
  /CIDToGIDMap /Identity
  /W [0 0 600.09766 1 1 795.89844 2 2 727.0508 3 3 647.9492 4 4 699.21875 5 5 461.91406 6 6 636.23047 7 7 526.85547 8 8 348.14453 9 9 871.09375 10 10 727.0508]
>>
endobj

4 0 obj
<<
  /Length 20
  /Filter [/ASCIIHexDecode /FlateDecode]
>>
stream
789CFBFF000002E001E0
endstream
endobj

5 0 obj
<<
  /Type /FontDescriptor
  /FontName /QXGCAR+DejaVuSerif-Bold
  /Flags 131078
  /FontBBox [22.949219 -208.00781 828.125 759.7656]
  /ItalicAngle 0
  /Ascent 759.7656
  /Descent -240.23438
  /CapHeight 759.7656
  /StemV 168.6
  /CIDSet 4 0 R
  /FontFile2 7 0 R
>>
endobj

6 0 obj
<<
  /Length 659
  /Type /CMap
  /WMode 0
>>
stream
%!PS-Adobe-3.0 Resource-CMap
%%DocumentNeededResources: procset CIDInit
%%IncludeResource: procset CIDInit
%%BeginResource: CMap Custom
%%Title: (Custom Adobe Identity 0)
%%Version: 1
%%EndComments
/CIDInit /ProcSet findresource begin
12 dict begin
begincmap
/CIDSystemInfo 3 dict dup begin
    /Registry (Adobe) def
    /Ordering (Identity) def
    /Supplement 0 def
end def
/CMapName /Custom def
/CMapVersion 1 def
/CMapType 0 def
/WMode 0 def
1 begincodespacerange
<0000> <FFFF>
endcodespacerange
1 beginbfchar
<0001> <00430068006100700074006500720020004F006E0065>
endbfchar
endcmap
CMapName currentdict /CMap defineresource pop
end
end
%%EndResource
%%EOF
endstream
endobj

7 0 obj
<<
  /Length 10088
  /Filter [/ASCIIHexDecode /FlateDecode]
>>

9 0 obj
<<

  /Subtype /CIDFontType2
  /BaseFont /DBBTOG+DejaVuSerif

    /Ordering (Identity)
    /Supplement 0
  >>
  /FontDescriptor 11 0 R
  /DW 0
  /CIDToGIDMap /Identity
  /W [0 0 600.09766 1 1 685.0586 2 2 602.0508 3 3 948.2422 4 4 591.7969 5 5 317.8711 6 6 560.0586 7 7 644.04297 8 8 401.85547 9 9 644.04297 10 10 478.02734 11 11 317.8711 12 12 765.1367 13 13 596.1914 14 14 640.1367 15 15 819.8242]

11 0 obj
<<
  /Type /FontDescriptor
  /FontName /DBBTOG+DejaVuSerif
  /Flags 131078
  /FontBBox [28.808594 -208.00781 920.89844 759.7656]
  /ItalicAngle 0
  /Ascent 759.7656
  /Descent -240.23438
  /CapHeight 759.7656
  /StemV 95.4
  /CIDSet 10 0 R
  /FontFile2 13 0 R
>>
endobj

12 0 obj
<<
  /Length 741
  /Type /CMap
  /WMode 0
>>
stream
%!PS-Adobe-3.0 Resource-CMap
%%DocumentNeededResources: procset CIDInit
%%IncludeResource: procset CIDInit
%%BeginResource: CMap Custom
%%Title: (Custom Adobe Identity 0)
%%Version: 1
%%EndComments
/CIDInit /ProcSet findresource begin
12 dict begin
begincmap
/CIDSystemInfo 3 dict dup begin
    /Registry (Adobe) def
    /Ordering (Identity) def
    /Supplement 0 def
end def
/CMapName /Custom def
/CMapVersion 1 def
/CMapType 0 def
/WMode 0 def
1 begincodespacerange
<0000> <FFFF>
endcodespacerange
2 beginbfchar
<0001> <0053006F006D006500200063006F006E00740065006E007400200068006500720065002E>
<000C> <00430068006100700074006500720020004F006E0065>
endbfchar
endcmap
CMapName currentdict /CMap defineresource pop
end
end
%%EndResource
%%EOF
endstream
endobj

13 0 obj
<<
  /Length 11771
  /Filter [/ASCIIHexDecode /FlateDecode]
>>
stream

endobj
